full_text:
Meng Tan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Tan. Proposed ambushing Guan Yu but the plan failed and he was killed. Meng Tan may not have existed in history. Meng Tan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Meng Tan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
